return(function(...)local Y,g do local h,S,U,l,m=math.floor,string.char,string.byte,tonumber,string.sub local function a(Y,g)local S=0 for U=0,7,1 do local l=Y/2+g/2 if l~=h(l)then S=S+2^U end Y=h(Y/2)g=h(g/2)end return S end local F,k="iiihhhiiiiihssss","\022\147\015\196\205\196\167\128\169\178\169\182\255\217\240\018\243\246\017\133\000\000\001\000\000\001\a\000\000\000__index\006\000\000\000__call\005\000\000\000__mod\005\000\000\000__mul"local K=65 local y=1579 local c=false local function Z(Y)local Z={}for g=1,#Y,2 do local h=m(Y,g,g+1)Z[#Z+1]=l(h,16)end local z={}for Y=0,3,1 do local g=Z[Y+1]local h=((g-y)+256)%256 local S=U(F,Y%16+1)local l=U(k,Y%K+1)z[Y+1]=a(a(h,S),l)end local f=((z[1]+z[2]*256)+z[3]*65536)+z[4]*16777216 local X={}for Y=1,f,1 do local g=Z[Y+4]if c and Y%2==0 then g=(g%16)*16+h(g/16)end local
